subject: Relion 3.1 star file support
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I've been using Warp with Relion 3.1 to process a single particle dataset. 
After 3D refinement I'd now like to move into M and continue processing but 
when I import the run_data.star file I get the error "Table does not 
contain all essential columns (coordinates, angles, micrograph name)". I'm 
guessing this is because Warp/M don't support the new Relion 3.1 star 
format. If so, are there plans to support the updated format in the near 
future? Do you know of any workarounds in the meantime or will I need to 
reprocess on an earlier version of Relion?

Cheers,

Mathew
